headings.usage_rules: Use tracking-tight for all headings. Never center unless required by layout symmetry. Keep line-height tight (leading-none).

body.usage_rules: Use for all tabular data, input fields, and regular text. Ensure high legibility.

colors.rules: 95% of the UI must be monochrome (White/Grey/Black). Use Green/Yellow/Red strictly for stock status indicators and critical actions to make them pop instantly against the structural greys.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard (p-2, p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12). Generous padding for all major containers.

dashboard_grid.rules: Strict hierarchy. High density. KPI summary cards span 1 column. Main data tables span full width or 3 columns. POS module spans full width.

layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense content, tables, and labels. Center align only empty states or specific icons.

motion.hover: Subtle border and background shifts (e.g., bg-white to bg-zinc-50). Text color MUST remain high contrast.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp corners (rounded-sm). Primary: bg-zinc-950 text-zinc-50 hover:bg-zinc-900. No heavy shadows.
components.inputs: Flat borders, bg-white, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-zinc-950 focus:border-zinc-950. No rounded full pills.
components.tables: Shadcn Table. Flat, dense. Subtle border-b on rows. Header text uppercase tracking-wider text-xs.
components.badges: Sharp (rounded-sm) not pill-shaped. Used for stock indicators.

image_urls.description: Minimalist white architecture, useful for a clean, structural login page background.
Clean white warehouse logistics background for empty states (e.g., no products found).

data_testid_conventions.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid. Use kebab-case and role-based naming.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow this JSON schema for colors and typography.
Do not use generic SaaS blue. Keep it monochrome structural (zinc/black) with Green/Yellow/Red strictly for stock status.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid for the dashboard: high density, clear F-pattern hierarchy with Total Sales at top left.
Use Shadcn UI components but override border-radius to `rounded-sm` and remove drop shadows for a Brutalist/Swiss feel.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' via font-source or Google Fonts if unavailable, fallback to a strong geometric sans. Use 'IBM Plex Sans' for body.
Ensure the POS module (Ventas) allows rapid, dense data entry. Avoid excessive whitespace inside the cart table. The form should be quick and actionable.
Apply stock indicator styles explicitly according to requirements: Green (stock > min + 2), Yellow (min < stock <= min + 2), Red (stock <= min).
Include a dynamic change calculation mechanism in the POS when the 'efectivo' (cash) payment method is selected.
